text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Yaeno. Fancy running into you here.
Might I ask what you're reading?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A martial arts guidebook, and a fascinating one
indeed. The original manuscript was written over
a century ago.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A martial arts guidebook... written more than a
hundred years ago, you say? That sounds like
quite the challenging read.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I thought the same thing at first. It's been
modernized though, so it's surprisingly easy to
make sense of.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Certain parts seem like they could apply to races,
too, like the detailed descriptions of how to steel
your heart and mind.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I could recommend a few martial arts guidebooks
for you, if you like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank you. If it's no trouble, then I accept
your kind offer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll look over my collection immediately. Then, if
you want to learn more about martial arts, we can
practice together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You'd be willing to teach me? How wonderful. I've
never had the opportunity to practice martial
arts. I hope you'll allow me to address you as
"Master" during our sessions.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, an inexperienced fledgling like myself is
unworthy of such a title.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I suggest we push one another to new
heights as rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Gladly. I shall endeavor to reach your level,
Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan reads through all the martial arts
guidebooks she's been recommended, learning
much in the process.
